input:
My Lord, strike fear in their hearts. Let them be shaken.” He kept praying earnestly and seeking God’s help, with his hands raised to the sky. His garment fell off his shoulder. Abū Bakr, his only companion to go into the shed with him, held the Prophet’s garment and put it back on his shoulder. He said soothingly: “Messenger of God! Not so hard with your appeal to Your Lord. He will surely grant you what He has promised you.” The Prophet, however, went on with his appeal and prayers, but he was soon momentarily overtaken by sleep.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 17: Badr: The First Major Battle

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 17: Badr: The First Major Battle

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a brown cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by brown cloak and subtle warm light.

characters.name: Abu Bakr al-Siddiq
characters.appearance: Late 40s, light olive skin, slender build, slightly shorter than average. Thin grey-streaked beard with slight reddish henna tint, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Kind gentle eyes, slightly stooped shoulders.

output.moral_lesson: When we seek help from Allah, we should do so with humility and faith.
output.narrative_text: The Prophet was praying intensely for Allah's help. His only companion, Abu Bakr, gently held his garment and put it back on his shoulder. Abu Bakr reminded the Prophet to be gentle in his prayers.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind, backlit by dim moonlight. Abu Bakr shown with full face, gentle expression. Soothing scene, appropriate for children.

output.image_prompt: Illustration in warm muted colors. Interior of a simple 7th century Makkah mud-brick shed. A man in white thobe and brown cloak, white turban, seen entirely from behind, standing with hands raised to the sky. His garment fell off his shoulder, but a slender older Arab man with light olive skin, thin grey-streaked beard with henna tint, off-white thobe and brown cloak, standing beside him, gently holding the garment and putting it back on his shoulder. Abu Bakr's face is calm and soothing. Dim moonlight streams through small openings in the shed. Medium shot, eye level. Simple mud-brick walls, clay water jug in corner. No modern objects.
